name: Clicks
long_description: Clicks is the AI-native BPO backed by Y Combinator. We replace traditional BPOs and shared service centers by automating back-office work with AI agents that operate your existing tools and follow your existing processes. We achieve higher accuracy and faster turn-around times at a fraction of the cost, with SOC 2 Type 2 and HIPAA compliance built in.
one_liner: AI agents for your back-office operations.
